name: io.github.webmyc/respira-wordpress
title: Respira WordPress MCP
description: 172 tools for 11 page builders. Duplicate-before-edit safety with rollback.

environmentVariables.name: WORDPRESS_URL

environmentVariables.description: Respira API key for the single-site env setup.

environmentVariables.name: RESPIRA_CONFIG_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to a Respira config JSON file.
